instructions.intent: Implement runtime guards that enforce batch position invariants identified in the audit synthesis. Batch position is the current set of nodes executable in parallel. Invariants include: nodes in a batch must have all dependencies satisfied, no node can be claimed by multiple workers, batch advancement must be atomic.
acceptance_criteria: Checks: (1) all nodes in batch have completed dependencies, (2) no duplicate claims, (3) batch is topologically valid
At least 10 unit tests (in enforce-audit.test.ts downstream)

invariantsToEnforce: No node in batch can have unsatisfied dependencies
No node can be in multiple concurrent batch executions
Batch order must respect topological sort
All artifacts from previous batch must exist before batch starts
